raw_model_payload.review__notes: The excerpt presents a clear tension_reversal: 浦郎 impersonates the famous scholar 牛布衣 by creating seals with that name, and the seal-engraver immediately defers to him with exaggerated respect. The humility formula '布衣是賤字' layered on top of the impersonation adds ironic pressure. The passage is self-contained, the social reversal is concrete and traceable to the text, and the judge focus on proportionate tension-reading is well-matched to the excerpt's restrained dramatic setup.

case.case_title: 儒林外史 / 第二十一回 冒姓字小子求名 念親戚老夫臥病 / tension_reversal
case.author: 吳敬梓
case.chapter_title: 第二十一回 冒姓字小子求名 念親戚老夫臥病
case.selection_reason: Selected to test whether the mechanism notices the passage's pressure or reversal without overblowing it.
case.judge_focus: Does the mechanism stay with the passage's tension and make a proportionate reading move?
case.excerpt_text:
浦郎把自己小名去了一個“郎”字，寫道：“一方陰文圖書，刻‘牛浦之印’；一方陽文，刻“布衣’二字。”
郭鐵筆接在手內，將眼上下把浦郎一看，說道：“先生便是牛布衣么？”
浦郎答道：“布衣是賤字。”
郭鐵筆慌忙爬出柜台來重新作揖，請坐，奉過茶來，說道：“久已聞得有位牛布衣住在甘露庵，容易不肯會人，相交的都是貴官長者，失敬！
失敬！
